case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC VS. CONSUELO ROJAS

docket_entries.description: RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT ROJAS, CONSUELO

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $282.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 100016814) AS TO DEFENDANT ROJAS, CONSUELO
